hero.title: Ship your next SaaS faster.
hero.subtitle: A neutral frontend template with auth, i18n, and billing examples wired in.

features.title: Included examples
features.subtitle: Minimal building blocks to start quickly without product-specific copy.

i18n.title: Localization
i18n.body: Switch language from the header using i18next resources.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.body: Email sign-in/sign-up flows are ready via Better Auth.

billing.title: Subscriptions
billing.body: Pricing page supports Polar products and checkout flow.

footer.text: Seed template for future SaaS projects.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Connect Polar products for live plans. Demo plans are shown until then.
